infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FairwayIQ uses the camera to set your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FairwayIQ needs access to your photo library to set your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: FairwayIQ reads fitness and activity data to enrich your golf rounds.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: FairwayIQ does not write health data.

plugins.photosPermission: FairwayIQ needs access to your photo library to set your profile picture.

plugins.calendarPermission: FairwayIQ would like to add your training sessions to your calendar.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: FairwayIQ needs your location for current weather data and play recommendations.

plugins.healthSharePermission: FairwayIQ reads fitness and activity data to enrich your golf rounds.
plugins.healthUpdatePermission: FairwayIQ does not write health data.
